items.name: use-drag-transform
items.title: useDragTransform
items.description: Transform-only drag hook: composited translate3d layer, pointer capture, viewport bounds clamping, keyboard arrow-key movement.

items.name: draggable-dialog
items.title: Draggable Dialog
items.description: shadcn-style composable dialog on Radix with a dedicated transform-only drag layer, scrollable body, and sticky header/footer.

items.name: dialog-manager
items.title: Dialog Manager
items.description: App-wide imperative dialog driven by a typed mitt emitter: mount once, then openDialog()/closeDialog() from anywhere.
